inputs.normalization_note: Optionality overlay: SOTP + catalyst stack. Price below FRMO-attributable book.
inputs.shares_source: FRMO/research/valuation.json pre-existing base SOTP shares, sourced to 2026-02-28_Quarterly_Report.pdf. [HUMAN REVIEW] confirm latest diluted count.

optionality_gate.notes: Trades ~22% below book ($8.55); same SOTP payoffs as prior refresh. HK/MIAX/CMSG catalysts unchanged.

bear.notes: Modest recovery toward book; marks flat

base.payoff_logic: Sum of parts in valuation.json sotp_build + deep_dive IRR Step 3; sums to $18.00/sh. Multiples 2.1x book and 2.7x price are results, not inputs.
base.years_logic: Model assumption: 5yr mid-point of 3-7yr catalyst window; not 10yr Lawrence; not company guidance.
base.notes: HK re-mark + partial SOTP close; book compounding

lines.label: Investment A look-through (82% of equity)
lines.math: Bottom-up ~$2.00/sh from weighted holdings (holdco_uplift_explanation.md) + ~$2.50/sh slack until look-through filed. GAAP 309M/44.02M=7.02 inside book.

lines.label: HKHC 4.42% + royalty + subsidiary marks
lines.math: Incremental: +2.00/sh (~88M). GAAP 37.4M/44.02M=0.85 inside book. SSI HK gap illustrative; HUMAN REVIEW.

lines.label: MIH/MIAX direct stake
lines.math: Incremental +0.50/sh. GAAP 13.9M/44.02M=0.32; ~271k MIAX sh at ~$51; price + fund look-through

lines.label: Winland + CMSG + small options
lines.math: Incremental +0.40/sh option value; Winland 5.5M + CMSG 0.7M in/near book

lines.label: Tie-out to $18 payoff (slack / Investment A marks via HKHC)
lines.math: 17.56 subtotal + 0.44 = 18.00; replace when Investment A look-through filed

sotp_build.payoff_equals: See assumption_ledger in valuation.json; deep_dive Step 3g

components.name: investment_a_hkhc_marks_slack
components.note: Brings HKHC line to 2.00/sh; HUMAN REVIEW

mih_miax.direct_incremental_note: 326690 × (60 − 42.60) at measurement date; recalc on refresh

components.mechanism: Permian royalty ~8% CAGR + partial water re-rate; below HK bull
Crypto sleeve normalization from cycle lows; not peak bull
Exchange volume growth + listing visibility; aligns with direct MIH thesis
Precious-metals streaming leverage on production growth
Data and clearing compounder; modest re-rate
Royalty portfolio growth on mine expansions
Listed affiliate re-rate; not FRMO direct equity-method line
Cash and private names; minimal mark until filed look-through

investment_a_lookthrough.note: blended_uplift_pct_derived = bottom_up / parent GAAP; not an input. See holdco_uplift_explanation.md

book_growth.note: Below recent mark-driven growth; conservative residual

bull.notes: HK + MIAX + CMSG listings; Winland control

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Private exchange stakes below economic value

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?

catalyst_paths.impact: HK re-mark + partial SOTP close; book compounding
Modest recovery toward book; marks flat

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

paths.label: Third-party context (HK + Substacks inventory)
paths.notes: Proxy: upside case when strategic third party has no spot IRR
paths.weight_why: Context-tier HK/Substacks until human promotes in third_party_sources.md; numeric proxy is weak.
weight_falsifiers: Using bull scenario as HK proxy when cross_check synthesis says no IRR upgrade
paths.hard_to_vary: no: proxy return is instrumentalist; prefer qualitative pp until approved blend

qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Third-party confirms asset quality not in GAAP book; not full floor at spot price
TPWR segment + index cannot replicate subsurface water exposure

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base

flags: Third-party numeric path proxies bull scenario (instrumentalist); HK cross-check says no base IRR upgrade. Prefer qualitative pp only until approved blend.
Qualitative ±pp stack may overlap numeric paths (moat/dhando); cap ±3pp and require source for each row.

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

top_dissents.label: Murray Stahl
top_dissents.falsifier: No asset intensity / pricing power (moat eroding + non-croupier)

top_dissents.label: Horizon Kinetics
top_dissents.falsifier: No dated contractual payoff or royalty/trust structure

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

valuation_methodology.decision_rule: Use one complete non-overlapping component schedule. The legacy Lawrence return path remains a separate stance gate until the primary evidence bridges are complete.

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Phase 3 scaffold identifies every currently known material operating, financial, liability, reserve, and option claim once. Primary ownership and cash/NAV bridges remain open follow-up gates.

valuation.evidence: Filing-backed proof from FRMO/investor-documents/ir-frmo/2026-02-28_Quarterly_Report.pdf; overlap_key=core_engine. Legacy Lawrence SOTP path remains separate stance gate.
valuation.cross_check: Non-overlapping component schedule reconciles to Q3 FY2026 quarterly report.
valuation.falsifier: Primary filing revises Investment A, affiliate marks, or share count >10% without matching proof update.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of FRMO, including every currently identified operating claim, financial claim, liability, reserve, and material option.
economic_claim.unit_source: FRMO/research/valuation.json pre-existing base SOTP shares, sourced to 2026-02-28_Quarterly_Report.pdf. [HUMAN REVIEW] confirm latest diluted count.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating and asset claims are valued once; cash, debt, financing, reserves, and other senior claims are separate components or explicitly reserved. No component is intended to overlap another.

economic_value.accounting_reference: Existing research and filing-derived valuation inputs. The primary-source reconciliation remains an open evidence gate.

component_groups.label: Look-through investment holdings
component_groups.valuation_basis: Phase 3 direct per-share scaffold. It is a provisional valuation range, not a committee-approved price target.
component_groups.adjustments: The low/base/high range incorporates ownership, tax, capital, cycle, timing, and realization uncertainty pending the primary bridge.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key core_engine; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key reinvestment_or_assets; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Look-through investment holdings
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

source.locator: Outstanding shares 44,022,781 as of February 28, 2026

high.label: Holdco discount, deferred tax, and realization reserve
high.rationale: Low case adds deferred tax ($122.6M consolidated) and OTC illiquidity haircut; high assumes near-par realization.

economic_ownership_map.evidence: Filing-backed proof from FRMO/investor-documents/ir-frmo/2026-02-28_Quarterly_Report.pdf; overlap_key=downside_reserve. Legacy Lawrence SOTP path remains separate stance gate.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: The low/base/high range incorporates ownership, tax, capital, cycle, timing, and realization uncertainty pending the primary bridge.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary filing revises Investment A, affiliate marks, or share count >10% without matching proof update.

method_route.label: Catalyst-backed asset value
failure_modes: gross proceeds used before tax and senior claims
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

blockers: option component reinvestment_or_assets requires probability, timing, and remaining-capital treatment

required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
